chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Adultery

text: 4980 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "قَالَ يَعْقُوبُ لاِبْنِهِ يُوسُفَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَا بُنَيَّ لاَ تَزْنِ فَإِنَّ اَلطَّيْرَ لَوْ زَنَى لَتَنَاثَرَ رِيشُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4980 - In the narration of Abdullah ibn Maymun from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), it is reported:
"Prophet Ya'qub (as) said to his son Yusuf (as): 'O' my son, do not commit fornication, for if a bird were to commit fornication, its feathers would fall off.'"
